result.summary: The page mostly renders correctly, but several horizontally laid-out components are clipped off the right edge, making the interface feel broken and harder to use.

issues.description: The top category tab row is cut off on the right, with the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Allow the tab row to scroll horizontally or reduce spacing so the full set of tabs fits within the viewport.

issues.description: Game tiles in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are partially off-screen on the right, with cards and titles clipped.
issues.suggestion: Fix the grid/carousel width and overflow behavior so all cards are fully visible or intentionally scrollable with clear controls.
